title: hieracium subruncinatum
intro: Hieracium subruncinatum, also known as Rough Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subruncinatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
